plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development pipeline: 15 atomic Socratic skills (survey the codebase → spec → design → data-model → api → tasks → tests → implement → review → ship) + 6 subagents, each with a per-role model+effort profile, plus a TDD implementation engine with agent-team and dynamic-workflow modes. survey persists a current-architecture map every later stage reads.
